title: Air cruiser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Republic_Air_Carrier.jpg|thumb|200px|thumb|A [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] model.]]
The term '''air cruiser''' denoted a type of long-ranged aerial artillery that was utilized by various galactic powers. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], both the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] utilized this type of siege weapon, while the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]], the [[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] did so in the years prior. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] also used these vehicles.

==Characteristics==
[[File:WookieeKasAirCruiser-SWGBCC.jpg|thumb|200|left|A [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] model.]]
Air cruisers were a type of very large [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]], and occasionally [[Realspace/Legends|spaceborne]], combat [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]]. Heavily armored and mounting a single large, siege-type weapon similar to a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]], which caused significant damage to anything caught in its blast radius, these military vehicles were very slow and cumbersome.

While a group of them could lay waste to an enemy encampment, troop formation, or military base in relatively short order despite their slow rate of fire, they were extremely vulnerable to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and other types of armed [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]]. In addition, if air cruisers wandered too near, they could be shot down by [[Air defense tower|air defense turrets]] or soldiers equipped with surface-to-air missiles despite their standard-issue shielding. Because of this, they were often escorted by smaller, swifter craft capable of dealing with potential airborne threats. Air cruisers utilized by the Gungans were actually mounted [[aquanna]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large, flying ray-type creature that was native to the wilds of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
